-{"id":"bd-2tfk6","title":"[OTel] Instrument HTTP + WebSocket request/handler spans","description":"## Scope

- HTTP:
  - create a span per request in middleware
  - add attributes: method, route, status, duration
- WS:
  - create spans around message handling paths
  - add attributes: messageType, channel, agentId (if applicable)

## Correlation

- Ensure spans include correlationId/traceId.
- Do not trust user-provided trace IDs when auth is enabled unless explicitly allowed.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T05:26:47.902827266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T05:28:22.768767778Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["backend","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2tfk6","depends_on_id":"bd-2sesi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:12Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2tfk6","depends_on_id":"bd-33fkz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:12Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"bd-2tfk6","title":"[OTel] Instrument HTTP + WebSocket request/handler spans","description":"## Scope

- HTTP:
  - create a span per request in middleware
  - add attributes: method, route, status, duration
- WS:
  - create spans around message handling paths
  - add attributes: messageType, channel, agentId (if applicable)

## Correlation

- Ensure spans include correlationId/traceId.
- Do not trust user-provided trace IDs when auth is enabled unless explicitly allowed.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T05:26:47.902827266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T03:43:17.966582069Z","closed_at":"2026-02-02T03:43:17.966502841Z","close_reason":"Implemented HTTP + WS spans; added tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["backend","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2tfk6","depends_on_id":"bd-2sesi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:12Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2tfk6","depends_on_id":"bd-33fkz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:16:12Z","created_by":"import"}]}
